mapper.sql: mc.id, mc.message_id, mc.parent_id, mc.user_id, mc.content, mc.is_anonymous, mc.create_time, mc.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , CASE WHEN mc.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.username END AS username, CASE WHEN mc.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS avatar_url, CASE WHEN mc.parent_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN parent_mc.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE parent_u.username END ELSE NULL END AS parent_username, COALESCE(like_count.count, 0) AS like_count FROM message_comment mc LEFT JOIN user u ON mc.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN message_comment parent_mc ON mc.parent_id = parent_mc.id LEFT JOIN user parent_u ON parent_mc.user_id = parent_u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT comment_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM comment_like GROUP BY comment_id ) like_count ON mc.id = like_count.comment_id WHERE mc.id = #{id}

SELECT , CASE WHEN mc.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.username END AS username, CASE WHEN mc.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS avatar_url, CASE WHEN mc.parent_id IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN parent_mc.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE parent_u.username END ELSE NULL END AS parent_username, COALESCE(like_count.count, 0) AS like_count FROM message_comment mc LEFT JOIN user u ON mc.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN message_comment parent_mc ON mc.parent_id = parent_mc.id LEFT JOIN user parent_u ON parent_mc.user_id = parent_u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT comment_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM comment_like GROUP BY comment_id ) like_count ON mc.id = like_count.comment_id WHERE mc.message_id = #{messageId} ORDER BY mc.parent_id ASC, mc.create_time ASC

SELECT , CASE WHEN mc.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.username END AS username, CASE WHEN mc.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar_url END AS avatar_url, CASE WHEN parent_mc.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE parent_u.username END AS parent_username FROM message_comment mc LEFT JOIN user u ON mc.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN message_comment parent_mc ON mc.parent_id = parent_mc.id LEFT JOIN user parent_u ON parent_mc.user_id = parent_u.id WHERE mc.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY mc.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_comment (message_id, parent_id, user_id, content, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{isAnonymous})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_comment mc LEFT JOIN user u ON mc.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN message_comment parent_mc ON mc.parent_id = parent_mc.id LEFT JOIN user parent_u ON parent_mc.user_id = parent_u.id
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%') OR (mc.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND parent_u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')))
